## Description

A clear description of the performance issue (slow response, high CPU/memory, crashes, etc.).

## Component

- [ ] Frontend (Control Panel)
- [ ] Frontend (Overlays)
- [ ] Backend (ASP.NET Core)
- [ ] SignalR Communication
- [ ] Database Queries
- [ ] Memory Management

## Environment

**Frontend:**

- Browser: [e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121]
- OS: [e.g., Windows 11, macOS 14]

**Backend:**

- .NET Version: [e.g., 9.0]
- OS: [e.g., Windows Server 2022, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Hardware: [e.g., CPU cores, RAM]

**OBS:**

- Version: [e.g., 30.1]
- Number of overlays running: [e.g., 4]
- Scene complexity: [Simple / Medium / Complex]

## Steps to Reproduce

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected Behavior

Normal performance or expected response time.

## Actual Behavior

Describe the performance degradation:

- Response time (slow, unresponsive)
- Resource usage (CPU %, Memory MB)
- Frequency (continuous or intermittent)
- Impact (freezing, lag, crashes)

## Metrics

If available, provide performance data:

- Browser DevTools measurements
- .NET Performance Profiler output
- System resource monitoring (Task Manager, etc.)
- Network latency/bandwidth info
